summary: Video set to music with no speech. Black title cards in thin serif type ('PRESIDENT DONALD T...', 'THE WHITE HOUSE') are intercut with two muscular men in fitted suits standing and then facing each other on the White House South Lawn, plus close-ups of a UFC 'FREEDOM 250' program with a stars logo and a gold UFC championship belt with a stars-and-stripes faceplate.

script.scene: Black screen with faint thin-serif title text resolving (reads like 'President Donald T...') over music.
Two muscular men in fitted suits (one navy, one tan) stand side by side on the South Lawn, the White House behind them, looking off.
The two men turn to face each other on the lawn, the White House and a red-brick building in the background.

Close-up of a UFC 'FREEDOM 250' program with a red, white and blue stars logo on a reflective wood table; cut to a gold UFC championship belt with a stars-and-stripes faceplate, overlaid with faint text.
Black title card with a line-drawn White House emblem and the text 'THE WHITE HOUSE.'

notable_text: Tweet: 'America's epic 250 summer loading... @UFC FIGHT NIGHT ON THE SOUTH LAWN'
